title: Among Us Infection
description: A very dumb mod that is related to Among Us in appearance only.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/uiczcELZk5U" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


Adds a new biome, the Among Forest and a new ore type, Amongius. It is very dumb and barely related to Among Us

- Amongwood Tree and Related Amongwood Blocks
- Amongius Ore which spawns Exclusively in the Among Forest
- Amongius Blade, Pickaxe, Launcher, Missile
- Amongius Forge and Storage Container
- Amongle Mob, Amongius Apple
